recommendations.title: Caramelo
recommendations.overview: After a life-changing diagnosis, a promising chef finds hope and humor with the help of a fur-midable dog friend.

recommendations.title: Soul Kitchen
recommendations.overview: In Hamburg, German-Greek chef Zinos unknowingly disturbs the peace in his locals-only restaurant by hiring a more talented chef.

recommendations.title: Haute Cuisine
recommendations.overview: The story of Danièle Delpeuch and how she was appointed as the private chef for François Mitterrand.

recommendations.title: Boiling Point
recommendations.overview: A head chef balances multiple personal and professional crises at a popular restaurant in London.

recommendations.title: Hunger
recommendations.overview: A talented young street-food cook pushes herself to the limit after accepting an invitation to train under an infamous and ruthless chef.

recommendations.title: Frank & Lola
recommendations.overview: A talented Las Vegas chef falls in love with an aspiring fashion designer but turns violently jealous when he realizes that she's hiding dark secrets.

recommendations.title: Jiro Dreams of Sushi
recommendations.overview: Revered sushi chef Jiro Ono strives for perfection in his work, while his eldest son, Yoshikazu, has trouble living up to his father's legacy.

recommendations.title: Natale da chef
recommendations.overview: A bizarre group consisting of a refined chef with unusual recipes, an assistant cook with taste disturbances and an improvised pastry chef takes part in a competition between chefs to win the contract for the G7.

recommendations.title: The Ramen Girl
recommendations.overview: An American woman is stranded in Tokyo after breaking up with her boyfriend. Searching for direction in life, she trains to be a ramen chef under a tyrannical Japanese master.

recommendations.title: Rebirth
recommendations.overview: A man's life is turned inside out after a visit from his college friend leads him into the unexpected.
